archimate:Grouping.name: Storage Infrastructure Enablers
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Storage Infrastructure Enablers ABB is a Grouping of a set of tools and digital services that facilitate the efficient and effective storage of data
Source: TECHNOPEDIA
Source reference: https://www.techopedia.com/definition/30476/storage-infrastructure
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): GARTNER- Distributed File Systems and Objects Storage Reviews and Ratings. https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/distributed-file-systems-and-object-storage
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Interoperability Saliency: Storage Infrastructure Enablers ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it establishes the mechanism to (i) ensure the correct management of the information across single or multiple infrastructures, and (ii) minimize the effects of data loss in case of unexpected behaviour of public services through data recovery strategies.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/StorageInfrastructureEnablersGrouping
ABB name: eira:StorageInfrastructureEnablersGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/StorageInfrastructureEnablersGrouping
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: Storage Infrastructure Enablers ABB is a Grouping of a set of tools and digital services that facilitate the efficient and effective storage of data

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): GARTNER- Distributed File Systems and Objects Storage Reviews and Ratings. https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/distributed-file-systems-and-object-storage

Storage Infrastructure Enablers ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it establishes the mechanism to (i) ensure the correct management of the information across single or multiple infrastructures, and (ii) minimize the effects of data loss in case of unexpected behaviour of public services through data recovery strategies.
